fix.item: File-integrity verification no longer flags optional (non-en-GB) language packs as drift — installs without a given language pack now verify cleanly.

addition.item: Backend notification centre: a toolbar bell with a quick panel and a full history view, backed by a generic notification store that any part of the component (or the API) can push into.
File-integrity verification: Tools > Security checks the installed files against the official, ed25519-signed checksums on the CDN and reports any modified, missing or unexpected files.
Package export tool (Tools): builds a repo-layout zip of the component for packaging and pull requests.

fix.item: Notifications: the sort dropdown showed raw language keys; the labels now translate correctly.
Notifications: the toolbar count badge now shows and hides correctly and is no longer overridden by the admin template styles.
Back-end menu: Tools is now the last item, after Notifications.

addition.item: Multilingual support across the catalog: per-language content (names, aliases and metadata) for categories, manufacturers, items and more.
Unique form fields: enforce unique values on custom form field options.
Items list (back end): new Categories and Manufacturers columns showing every related entry per item, with translated names.
Items list (back end): working Categories and Manufacturers filters (multi-select) in the search toolbar.
Order statuses: role-flag taxonomy (Initial / Cancellation / Completed) replacing the legacy is_default column, with save/publish/delete invariants.
Order statuses: status-change email notifications — per-status customer and admin emails, admin recipient picker, notify_customer toggle.
Order-status emails: selectable per-recipient email wrapper layout, position-based editors discovered from the chosen layout, token picker and live test-send.

Order-status emails: custom layouts are auto-discovered from the emails/order/ folder (component or admin-template override); their positions, labels and Restore-defaults content are driven by COM_ALFA_ORDEREMAIL_* language constants.
Update server configured so future releases are delivered via Joomla's extension updater.

fix.item: Added the missing #__alfa_form_field_groups table to install, uninstall and the update schema — form field group screens no longer error on a clean install.
Update SQL moved to sql/updates/mysql/ (with the manifest schemapath) so the System > Database "Fix" tool recognises com_alfa instead of silently skipping it.
Order-status email "Restore defaults" now fills every position (Subject, Header, Intro, Outro, Legal) instead of only the intro.
Items category filter form (filter_categories.xml): removed a broken PHP fragment embedded in an XML attribute.
Back-end Tools menu label (COM_ALFA_TITLE_TOOLS) now resolves in the Components menu (was missing from the system language file).
Cart menu item type: corrected the description language key and wording.
Manufacturer menu item type: replaced leftover COM_TEST_* skeleton language keys with COM_ALFA_* keys.
Order-status engine converted to InnoDB along with the remaining MyISAM tables for transaction and FK support.

language.item: Reorganised and de-duplicated the administrator language files; removed ~586 unused keys and grouped the rest into clearly labelled sections.
Cleaned the system language file: removed dead legacy-updater keys, added the Tools menu label, normalised menu-item-type titles and descriptions.
Replaced the borrowed com_content batch label with the component's own COM_ALFA_BATCH_OPTIONS, removing a cross-component dependency.
Extended the order-status email help note with guidance on creating custom layouts, positions and their language constants.

note.item: Existing sites can apply the new #__alfa_form_field_groups table via System > Database > Fix; fresh installs get it automatically.
